title: Appointment Management System
description: A full-stack web application for managing appointments with authentication, scheduling, and REST API integration. Designed with scalable backend architecture and clean UI.

title: Gomoku AI Game Engine
description: An AI-powered Gomoku game engine built using Python with intelligent move logic, win detection algorithms, and grid-based gameplay.

title: Spotify Web Clone
description: A high-performance frontend clone of the Spotify web player. Built using React and the Context API for seamless state management. Integrates with the Spotify REST API to fetch data and render a beautiful, responsive UI.

title: Text-to-Speech Converter
description: A powerful offline Text-to-Speech conversion engine built with Python and Tkinter. Features offline functionality with advanced controls for adjusting voice profiles, speech speed, and playback volume.
